reason: Node 1.4.3 declares NO dependencies, but it logically depends on Node 1.4.2 (which provides the Artin-Wedderburn decomposition pi_phi(A)' = oplus M_{n_j}(C)) and Node 1.4.1 (finite-dimensionality of the commutant). Without these as explicit dependencies, the node asserts the correspondence in a vacuum -- the Artin-Wedderburn blocks whose correspondence it claims to describe are established in 1.4.2. The node should declare deps: [1.4.1, 1.4.2] at minimum.
